description: Operator noticed hydrocarbon vapor near P-101A gland during rounds. Area evacuated. Seal replaced under WO-2024-001.
root_cause: Mechanical seal degradation due to off-spec process fluid pH
corrective_actions: Install pH monitor on suction; upgrade to Plan 54 seal flush

description: C-401 tripped on high vibration. Unplanned shutdown of NHT unit for 6 hours. Production loss ~120 MT naphtha.
root_cause: Valve plate fatigue failure - missed during last PM
corrective_actions: Revise PM interval from 18 months to 12 months; add online vibration monitoring

description: Small fire at FI-801 base due to liquid carryover in flare header during high-load operation. Extinguished by field operator using portable CO2.
root_cause: Flare KO drum high level not alarmed - transmitter failed
corrective_actions: Replace level transmitter; add independent high-high level shutdown; revise HAZOP

description: Spill of ~50 litres naphtha during manual drain valve operation due to blocked drain line. Contained within bund.
root_cause: Procedure not followed - drain valve opened before confirming downstream clear
corrective_actions: Toolbox talk refresher; revise SOP OP-TF-003 to add pre-check step

description: PSV-701 lifted at 5% below set pressure during process upset. Confirmed set-point drift on bench test.
root_cause: PSV not re-certified after last turnaround as per OISD-116 schedule
corrective_actions: Immediate bench certification; update compliance tracker; assign ownership to Instrument dept
